mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( username, password, nickname, avatar, phone, email, school, student_id, credit_score, level, is_verified, status, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{avatar, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{school, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{studentId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creditScore, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{level, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isVerified, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deleted, jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_user
nickname = #{nickname},
avatar = #{avatar},
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
school = #{school},
student_id = #{studentId},
status = #{status},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
